summary: Known customer device was replaced by a Romanian IP before a high-value electronics purchase
recommended_action: Step-up authentication and contact customer through verified channel

summary: Declined digital-goods transaction followed the electronics purchase on the same unknown device
recommended_action: Temporarily limit ecommerce card usage until customer confirms activity

summary: High-risk offshore wire followed a crypto purchase and new foreign device
recommended_action: Hold wire and open AML review

summary: Small-business account attempted large wire to high-risk money-services merchant
recommended_action: Review invoice evidence and beneficial owner context

summary: Restricted wealth account attempted high-value offshore wire from unknown foreign device
recommended_action: Freeze online wires and escalate to fraud operations

summary: Multiple small digital-goods attempts occurred within minutes
recommended_action: Card controls confirmed and customer notified

summary: ATM withdrawal followed held offshore wire on same suspicious device session
recommended_action: Place temporary withdrawal limit and verify customer
